use_cases: Primary CTA button on landing pages requiring high visual impact
Interactive counter or action trigger in web applications
Call-to-action button in marketing sites with neon aesthetic themes
Form submission button with engaging micro-interactions
Highlighted action button in dashboards or product UIs
ai_summary: A single animated button component featuring a vibrant lime-green neon gradient with glow shadows and 3D perspective transforms. The button includes multiple interactive states: ripple effect on click, hover lift/scale/rotate animations, active press feedback, and styled focus/disabled states. Designed as a high-impact call-to-action element for SaaS and dev-tool applications.
